creator: draco@marino.st
text:
FYI, I'm getting a new value now, that came with 0.12.4_4.
I think it has something to do with "CABAL_SETUP=Setup.hs" being removed 
from the makefile because it fails before configure starts with:

<no location info>: can't find file: Setup.lhs
*** Error code 1

However, bsd.cabal.mk didn't get updated so I suspect that's the 
problem.  I'll move back to 0.12.4_3.
